description: Low-cost healthcare program for NYC residents who are uninsured and do not qualify for or cannot afford health insurance. Open to all regardless of immigration status.

eligibility.notes: No strict income limit. For those who cannot afford or are ineligible for insurance, including undocumented residents. Provides a primary care provider, specialty care, prescriptions, and more at NYC Health + Hospitals facilities.

apply_in_person: Visit any NYC Health + Hospitals facility or call 646-NYC-CARE (646-692-2273).
how_to_apply: Call 646-NYC-CARE (646-692-2273) or visit any NYC Health + Hospitals location to enroll.
citation: Administered by NYC Health + Hospitals under mayoral initiative
